Reply Template: Dear [Customer Name], Thank you for your patience. We regret to inform you that your order [Order Number] will be delayed by approximately [X] days due to [reason: port congestion/customs inspection/production delay]. The new estimated delivery date is [Date]. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. As compensation, we would like to offer you a [5-10%] discount on your next order. Please let us know if you have any concerns or questions. Best regards, [Your Name]

Dear [Customer Name], Thank you for your interest in [Product Name]. Unfortunately, this item is currently out of stock due to high demand. We expect to have new inventory available by [Date]. We can offer you the following alternatives: 1) Reserve your order now with [X%] deposit and we will ship as soon as stock arrives, 2) Consider our similar product [Alternative Product] which is currently in stock, or 3) We can notify you immediately when stock becomes available. Please let us know how you would like to proceed. Best regards, [Your Name]

Dear [Customer Name], We have received your payment of [Amount] [Currency] for order [Order Number]. Payment details: Invoice Number: [Invoice Number], Payment Method: [T/T/PayPal/L/C], Payment Date: [Date], Amount Received: [Amount]. Your order is now confirmed and will enter production within 2 business days. We will send you production updates and shipping information as your order progresses. Thank you for your business! Best regards, [Your Name]

Dear [Customer Name], I hope this email finds you well. I am following up on the quotation we sent on [Date] for [Product Name]. Have you had a chance to review our proposal? We would be happy to answer any questions or discuss any adjustments to better meet your requirements. Our quotation is valid until [Date]. If you would like to proceed, we can arrange sample production immediately. We value the opportunity to work with you and look forward to your response. Best regards, [Your Name]

Dear [Customer Name], Thank you for approving the samples for [Product Name]. We are pleased to move forward with your bulk order. Next steps: 1) Please confirm the final order quantity and any specification changes, 2) We will send you a Proforma Invoice for 30% deposit, 3) Production will begin within 2 days of receiving deposit, 4) Estimated production time is [X] days, 5) We will send you production photos for approval before shipment. Please confirm the above details and we will proceed immediately. Thank you for your trust in our products! Best regards, [Your Name]

Dear Valued Customer, Please be informed that our office and factory will be closed for [Holiday Name] from [Start Date] to [End Date]. We will resume normal operations on [Return Date]. During this period: - No shipments will be made, - Email responses may be delayed, - Urgent matters can be directed to [Emergency Contact]. We recommend placing orders before [Date] to avoid delays. Orders received during the holiday will be processed starting [Return Date]. We apologize for any inconvenience and thank you for your understanding. Best regards, [Company Name]

Dear [Customer Name], Thank you for bringing this quality issue to our attention. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by [describe issue]. We take quality very seriously and this does not meet our standards. To resolve this matter: 1) Please send us photos and a detailed description of the defect, 2) We will investigate the root cause immediately, 3) We will send replacement units via express shipping at no charge, 4) As compensation, we offer [discount/credit] on your next order. We value your business and are committed to making this right. Please confirm the above solution works for you. Best regards, [Your Name]

Dear [Customer Name], Thank you for your interest in [Product Name] and for your feedback on pricing. We appreciate your business and would like to work with you. Our pricing is based on [material costs/labor/quality standards]. However, we can offer the following options to meet your budget: 1) Increase order quantity to [X] units for [Y%] discount, 2) Adjust specifications [list changes] to reduce cost by [Z%], 3) Consider alternative materials while maintaining quality standards. Our goal is to provide you with the best value while maintaining our quality commitment. Please let us know which option works best for you or if you would like to discuss further. Best regards, [Your Name]
